headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.google.com https://*.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' https://www.google.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.google.com https://*.gstatic.com; object-src 'none';
